creator: trix@basement.net
text:
Logwatch is a customizable, pluggable log-monitoring system.  It will go
through your logs for a given period of time and make a report in the areas
that you wish with the detail that you wish.

WWW: http://www.logwatch.org:81/

Back in 2004, Michael Ranner <mranner@inode.at> attempted to add
Logwatch to the ports tree at version 5.2.2 with PR ports/74996
(http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=74996&cat=ports), but the
PR was allowed ot "time out" and has been closed since March of 2005.

I would like to try to re-open this issue and get Logwatch into the
FreeBSD ports tree at version 7.3.6.
